results.title: Gaps in tariff effects among provinces could test Team Canada's unity: experts
results.description: Experts warn the latest tariff threats from the United States will hit some provinces harder than others — and could test the united Team Canada front.

results.title: Oil set for weekly rise amid Red Sea shipping attacks, Kazakhstan output cuts
results.description: Oil prices are poised for weekly gains amid Red Sea shipping concerns. Houthi attacks on tankers have raised fears about a key shipping route. Kazakhstan has also temporarily reduced oil output after drone attacks. Its main Black Sea export terminal faced a temporary closure. These disruptions are tightening global energy supply routes.

Mount Rainier Scenic Railroad begins track rehab north of Elbe
results.description: ELBE, Wash. — The Mt. Rainier Scenic Railroad has begun track restoration north of Elbe, Wash., according to a statement on its Facebook page.
